questionHtml: Explain why zero intensity is observed at position A.
markschemeHtml:
the diagram shows the combined effect of «single slit» diffraction and «double slit» interference

recognition that there is a minimum of the single slit pattern

OR

a missing maximum of the double slit pattern at A

waves «from the single slit» are in antiphase/cancel/have a path difference of (n + 1 2 )λ/destructive interference at A

meta.title: Explain why zero intensity is observed at position A.
